title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: A JavaScript Mastery tutorial demonstrating how to build a full React Native Duolingo clone using an AI-assisted workflow called Practical Vibe Coding. The tutorial shows how to ship production apps in a single weekend without manual coding, integrating tools like Clerk for authentication, PostHog for analytics, Vision Agents for AI capabilities, and Stream for real-time features.
